message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts
Failing test: "damage to high-enchantment item (level 8+) reimbursed at 50%: payout 400 G"
Current error: Expected 400, received 900 (current impl: damage - 100 = 1000-100 = 900)
Passing tests so far: 21

Spec: Damage to items with enchantment ≥ 8 is reimbursed at 50% of the damage amount. Then deductible (100) applies.

Test: sword ench=8, damage 1000. Payout = 1000 * 0.5 - 100 = 400.

Working directory: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-17_01-11-17_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking
Run tests with: pnpm test

Implement: for each damage, find the matching item in policy.items by itemType. If item has enchantment ≥ 8, multiply damage by 0.5 first, then subtract 100 deductible. Otherwise standard: damage - 100. Don't add dragon-material handling yet.

Minimal. Do NOT refactor.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return after completion.

content.text: I'll implement the minimal change to make this test pass.

content.text:
Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: In `claim()`, find the matching item in `policy.items` by `itemType`. If the item has `enchantment >= 8`, multiply damage by 0.5 before subtracting the 100 deductible.
**Result**: All tests now pass (22 passing, 9 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal — only added the enchantment ≥ 8 check that the failing test demands. No dragon-material handling, no extraction of constants/helpers, no generalization beyond the single damage entry case.
